About Rachel

A Little Bit About Me

Hi, I'm Rachel! 🐾 I've had animals in my life for as long as I can remember and am pursuing animal care full-time. I'm a proud Star Sitter on Rover with a 5.0 rating and 48+ five-star reviews — and I bring that same heart to every Housley Happy Paws visit. At home I have Moose (yellow lab), Cookie (chihuahua), three cats, and hermit crabs, so I truly understand how much your pets mean to you.

I'm based right here in Lancaster, PA, and I've had the privilege of caring for dogs and cats of all shapes, sizes, and personalities. Every single one has my full attention and a lot of love.

"I treat your pets the way I'd want mine treated — like they're the most important thing in the room."

Services & Pricing

Transparent Pricing, No Surprises

Every service includes photos and a personal report. What you see is what you pay.

🤝
Meet & Greet
Free
An introductory visit so your pet can get comfortable with their new sitter. We'll go over your pet's routine, preferences, and any special needs.
  • In-home introduction with your pet
  • Review feeding, walking & medication routines
  • Exchange keys & emergency contacts
  • No obligation — just a chance to meet!
🦮
Dog Walking
$25 / 30 min
$45 / 1 hour
I come to your home and get your pup ready for a nice, long walk! Every walk is GPS tracked with a detailed report card sent to you afterward. Water bowls will also be refreshed upon returning!
  • Live GPS tracking
  • Photo updates mid-walk
  • Personal walk report card
  • Route map included
+$10 per additional dog · +$5 puppy surcharge · +$10 holiday rate
🚪
Drop-In Visit
From $20 / 30 min
I come to your home and make sure your pets are fed, have fresh water, had potty break including clean up, and have lots of playtime and attention! Cats too — feeding, litter box cleaning, and playtime. I also can address any special needs or requests, such as medication, etc.!
▸ View Rates
  • 🐶 Dog (30 min)$25
  • 🐶 Dog (1 hour)$45
  • 🐱 Cat (30 min)$20
  • 🐱 Cat (1 hour)$35
  • Additional Dog+ $10
  • Additional Cat+ $10
  • Puppy Surcharge+ $5
  • Holiday Surcharge+ $10
  • In-home care & feeding
  • Playtime & companionship
  • Litter box / waste cleanup
  • Arrival & departure photos
🏡
House Sitting
$125 / night
Going away? I stay at your home and care for your pets in their own environment — keeping their routine, giving medication if needed, and sending regular updates and photos so you have complete peace of mind while you're gone!
▸ View Additional Rates
  • Dog(s)$125 / night
  • Cat(s)$80 / night
  • Additional Dog+ $35 / dog / night
  • Additional Cat+ $15 / cat / night
  • 3+ Animals+ $20 / each / night
  • Puppy Surcharge+ $5 / night
  • Holiday Surcharge+ $10 / night
  • In-home overnight care
  • Maintain pet's routine
  • Regular photo updates
  • Medication admin if needed

Auto-Reply Setup 🤖

Set what new clients and inquiries hear from you instantly.

Meet & Greet Auto-Reply

Sent instantly when someone requests a meet & greet.

Placeholders: Use [Name] for the client's name and [Pet Name] for their pet — these auto-fill when sent!
General Inquiry Auto-Reply

Sent when someone submits the contact form.

Placeholder: Use [Name] for the client's name — it auto-fills when sent!

💳 Payments & Bank Setup

Connect your payment accounts and banking — step by step.

💜
Stripe
Recommended · 2.9% + 30¢ per payment
The gold standard for online payments. Clients pay by card, money deposits directly to your bank account within 2 business days. Free to set up.
Open Stripe →
✅ Once connected, a "Pay Now" button appears on every booking confirmation.
Other Payment Options
💙 PayPal / Venmo
Paste your PayPal.me or Venmo link
🟩 Square
Great for in-person payments too
💚 Cash App
Your Cash App $cashtag

✏️ Page Content
🔗 Link Settings
How It Works

Changes you make here save directly to the live landing page at housleyhappypaws.com/links. No downloading or deploying needed — just edit and click Save. Anyone who scans your QR code will see your latest content instantly.
